use_cases: E-commerce platforms requiring product image uploads with aspect ratio control
Content management systems where users need to upload and crop profile photos or banners
Creator platforms for uploading and editing visual content thumbnails
Media applications allowing users to upload and prepare images for articles or posts
SaaS dashboards enabling users to upload branded assets with consistent dimensions
ai_summary: A multi-image uploader component with integrated cropping functionality powered by react-easy-crop. Users can select multiple images, preview them, apply zoom and position adjustments, and save cropped versions. Built with standard UI primitives (Card, Button) in a flat visual style, this composite component is ideal for platforms requiring user-generated visual content with controlled dimensions such as e-commerce, media sites, or creator tools.
